user.title: Fluora Light
user.description: Manually add a Fluora device by IP/hostname. If auto-discovery found your device, it should appear as a separate notification.

discovery_confirm.title: Fluora discovered
discovery_confirm.description: A Fluora light was discovered on your network at {host}. Add it to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach that host on the network. Check the IP/hostname and that the Fluora is powered on and connected to Wi-Fi.
